summary: Excellent Python adherence with type hints, clear error handling, and proper dataclass usage. Workflow uses pinned action refs (v4, v5) and least-privilege permissions correctly. Minor concerns: CI gate step builds env vars verbosely (lines 86-91 could collapse into single Python snippet); run_act_tests.py setup_temp_repo repeats file-copy pattern 3x (shutil.copy2, shutil.copytree ×2) without abstraction, though acceptable for test harness. Fixtures and test_secret_rotation.py referenced but not shown; assuming they exist per task requirements. Code is production-ready with no logic bugs detected.
